textByHashes.df93db39cd82a8e3f728c289de4bae7295d607c5: YOU WOULDN'T KNOW HOW TO KILL A TROLL IF IT CAME UP AND BIT YER ARM OFF!
textByHashes.cd13cd93e5fd1cb21227398b4c695eddb412e445: CALL THAT A TOWN, I'VE SEEN BETTER HAMLETS!
textByHashes.1c90a6d7bf541086872cdf1f6402732ec057c915: AND YOUR FATHER SMELLED OF WINTERBERRIES.
textByHashes.969830db96d7773921886b076a71cd477aff0436: OUR KING'S BETTER THAN YOUR BURGHER!
